form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 2170m at Junee, beaten 20 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $8. At the run before was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 1720m at Young was 6th-9.4 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Peaksart (2:09.20) in NR 38 to 39 on March 24 at $6.50. One to consider as her best is good enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start and caused a false start.
Upon entering the home straight jostled with Rocket Me.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 2170m at Junee, at the bell was 2nd-4.4 beaten 10 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $21. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 24 m by Magic Matteo (2:10.80) in NR 41 to 46 on March 17 at $101. Before that was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 30 m by Kalkadoon Dreaming (2:10.70) in NR 42 to 45 on February 24 at $71. Hard to make a case.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced passing the 1500m when Stipulating broke gait.
Checked passing the 300m when Stipulating broke gait.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway was 3rd-5.4 at the bell, beaten a nose by Kristysgirl (2:05.30) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $18. With further improvement can go one better.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 30 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $31. At the run before 5th (Fr1) over 1720m at Young was 2nd-4.1 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Lucky Zara (2:05.50) in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $13. Likely improver.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gear during the event, namely the near side rear carrying strap.
Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr3) over 2170m after racing wide at Junee beaten 20 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $15. At her previous start 5th (Sr2) over 1770m at Canberra beaten 23 m by Kalypso Rainbow (2:11.40) in 3yo+ NR up to 44 on March 9 at $9.50. Rates highly on best form and can bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced during the middle stages of the event.
Inconvenienced near the 1800m when Fresh Prince broke gait.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Millie Francis at Canberra over 1770m in a NR up to 48 on March 15 at $34. Then a handy effort when beaten by 9 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Majors Creek at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $14. Bright prospects again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running until near the 100m.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 6 m finishing fourth behind Emerging Deal at Canberra over 1770m in a NR up to 53 on March 15 at $18. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Majors Creek at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $6. Expected to feature again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 3rd-5.8 beaten 12 m by Potter (2:10.20) in NR up to 53 on March 31 at $9. At her previous start good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 3rd-9.2 beaten 6 m by Shes Got A Reason (2:02.70) in NR up to 52 on March 24 at $26. Sure to be in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced near the 100m when Marabelle shifted out.

form.formComment: Last start just off the speed and boxed on; won by 3 m when quickly away, (Fr3) at Goulburn (2:04.80) beating Eyedidntloseit in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $6.50 at the bell was 3rd-3.9. Awkward draw but in-form and expected to go well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start just off the speed and boxed on; won by 3 m when quickly away, (Fr3) at Goulburn (2:04.80) beating Eyedidntloseit in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $6.50 at the bell was 3rd-3.9. Awkward draw but in-form and expected to go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide early before restraining to obtain cover.
Held up and unable to obtain clear running.
Tightened racing towards the first turn.
Inclined to hang in when placed under pressure in the home straight.
